text: £ Question Technique @ msssncnnie. @ s * Questions are 1-2 lines of preamble (scenario) * Then the question itself * 4-5 Answers .. multi choice or multi-select * At the associate level - generally answer is simple right and wrong e Occasionally ‘most suitable’ from some right answers * There are generally 1 or 2 answers which can be excluded ¢ .. locate those first.
